zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Jacob Dising於1561年6月29日出生在英國素福爾可丹納姆時，他的父親Christopher Dising25歲，母親Mariam Spooner21歲。他於1580年11月27日與Elizabeth Lovell在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1600年11月在英國艾可貝盧哈普 聖 保羅享年39歲，埋葬在英國艾可貝盧哈普 聖 保羅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Jacob Dising于1561年6月29日出生在英国素福爾可丹納姆时，他的父亲Christopher Dising25岁，母亲Mariam Spooner21岁。他于1580年11月27日与Elizabeth Lovell在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1600年11月在英国艾可貝盧哈普 聖 保羅享年39岁，埋葬在英国艾可貝盧哈普 聖 保羅。

nameMeanings.name: Dising
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably an altered form of Leising, a habitational name from a place so named in Bavaria.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: Jacob
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from Hebrew Yaakov. This was borne by perhaps the most important of all the patriarchs in the Book of Genesis. Jacob was the father of twelve sons, who gave their names to the twelve tribes of Israel. He was the son of Isaac and Rebecca and twin brother of Esau. According to the story in Genesis, he was the cunning younger twin, who persuaded his brother Esau to part with his right to his inheritance in exchange for a bowl of soup (‘a mess of pottage’). Later, he tricked his blind and dying father into blessing him in place of Esau. The derivation of the name has been much discussed. It is traditionally explained as being derived from Hebrew akev ‘heel’ and to have meant ‘heel grabber’, because when Jacob was born ‘his hand took hold of Esau's heel’ (Genesis 25:26). This is interpreted later in the Bible as ‘supplanter’ Esau himself remarks, ‘Is he not rightly named Jacob? for he has supplanted me these two times’ (Genesis 27:36). Jacob is especially common as a Jewish given name, although it also became very popular among the Puritans from the 16th century onwards, and has again been widely used since the 1990s. Compare James .

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Jacob Dising was born on 29 June 1561, in Denham, Suffolk, England, his father, Christopher Dising, was 25 and his mother, Mariam Spooner, was 21. He married Elizabeth Lovell on 27 November 1580, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in November 1600, in Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England, at the age of 39, and was buried in Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Jacob Dising est né le 29 juin 1561, à Denham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Christopher Dising, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Mariam Spooner, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Lovell le 27 novembre 1580, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en novembre 1600, à Belchamp St Paul, Essex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterré à Belchamp St Paul, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Jacob Dising am 29. Juni 1561 in Denham, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Christopher Dising 25 und seine Mutter Mariam Spooner 21. Er hat am 27. November 1580 in London, England Elizabeth Lovell geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb im November 1600 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England und wurde in Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Jacob Dising è nato il il 29 giugno 1561 nel Denham, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Christopher Dising, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Mariam Spooner, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Lovell il 27 novembre 1580, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1600, nel Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolto a Belchamp St Paul, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Jacob Disingが1561年6月29日にイギリススフォルクデンハムで生まれた時，父Christopher Disingは25歳，母Mariam Spoonerは21歳であった。1580年11月27日にイギリスロンドンでElizabeth Lovellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1600年11月にイギリスエセックスベルチャンップ スト プアウルで39歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスベルチャンップ スト プアウルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Jacob Dising(이)가 1561년 6월 29일 영국 수폴크 데함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Christopher Dising(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Mariam Spooner(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1580년 11월 27일 영국 런던에서 Elizabeth Lovell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1600년 11월 영국 에세스 벨챔프 스트 폴에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 벨챔프 스트 폴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Jacob Dising nasceu em 29 de junho de 1561, em Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Christopher Dising, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Mariam Spooner, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Lovell em 27 de novembro de 1580, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em novembro de 1600, em Belchamp St Paul, Essex, Inglaterra, com 39 anos, e foi sepultado em Belchamp St Paul, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Jacob Dising родился 29 июня 1561 г. в местности денам, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Christopher Dising было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Mariam Spooner, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Lovell 27 ноября 1580 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер ноябрь 1600 г. в местности белчамп ст поул, эссекс, Англия в возрасте 39 лет и был похоронен в местности белчамп ст поул, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Jacob Dising nació el 29 de junio de 1561, en Denham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Christopher Dising, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Mariam Spooner, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Lovell el 27 de noviembre de 1580, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1600, en Belchamp St Paul, Essex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultado en Belchamp St Paul, Essex, Inglaterra.
